variations.title: Cold-open — bomb mid-arc, HP 15%
variations.hypothesis: Pattern-interrupt in first 1.5s: bomb already falling, massive damage, red danger vignette → maximizes retention@5s
diff_from_baseline: playable/script.js: PHASE_INTRO_END 4500→2700 + red radial vignette during intro (0..1500ms)
scene_exterior/index.js: opening flock t0+200/dur=2200 → t0+0/dur=1100, dmgVal 33→85
variations.review_notes: Axis respected (only intro hook touched). Combat loop unchanged downstream — freeplay/forcewin/endcard intact. Build 2.09 MB.

variations.title: Aim-preview — persistent trajectory dotted line
variations.hypothesis: Showing the parabolic arc before the user touches the screen lifts mechanic clarity and reduces fail-shots in the first 5s
diff_from_baseline: scene_interior/aim.js: drawAimOverlay now renders an idle preview arc (62°, power 0.7, pulsing alpha) when the player isn't dragging
variations.review_notes: Axis respected (only aim render touched, not input). Active-drag preview unchanged. Visible in thumb at INTERIOR_AIM.

variations.title: Night-storm — navy sky + lightning flashes
variations.hypothesis: Storm/night palette + periodic lightning is a strong visual pattern-interrupt vs bright baseline; lifts thumb-stop probability in feed
diff_from_baseline: scene_exterior/index.js: sky gradient teal→deep-navy/bruise-purple, hills crushed to dark slate, forest near-black
scene_exterior/index.js: periodic 70ms lightning flash every 3.2s with soft afterglow
variations.review_notes: Axis respected (palette only — sky/hills/forest tints + lightning overlay). Combat loop untouched. Note: thumb captures past-intro interior view; storm visible during exterior cuts (each turn).

variations.title: Fail-tease endcard — TOO CLOSE / TRY AGAIN
variations.hypothesis: Inverting the victory CTA into a fail-tease ("barely held the wall, do better?") frames install as a redemption attempt — lifts CTA pull on curious users
diff_from_baseline: playable/endcard.js: 'VICTORY!' → 'TOO CLOSE!' (red), supporting copy reframed as challenge, CTA 'PLAY NOW' → 'TRY AGAIN'
variations.review_notes: Axis respected (endcard copy/colors only). CTA tap handler unchanged. Thumb captured at forced endcard phase.
